messages.content: Write "I do not eat meat, I am a vegetarian." in Mandarin Chinese (Traditional)
我不吃肉，我是素食者。
Write "she is going to single-handed win this game for her team" in Mandarin Chinese (Traditional) in a causal and informal manner.
她要一個人就把這場比賽贏給她的隊伍了。
Translate "她要一個人就把這場比賽贏給她的隊伍了。" to English.
She is going to win this game for her team all by herself.
Write "They satisfy their hunger with elaborate preparation and with delicacies." in Spanish.
Satisfacen su hambre con preparaciones elaboradas y con delicadezas.
Translate "Pasen una imagen más dura que esta" to English
"Send a picture tougher than this one."
Write "Send a picture tougher than this one." in Ido.
Sendez fotografuro plu dura kam ca.
Write "To the nationalistically blind" in Ido
Ad la blindi nacionalismale

Translate "Juro que esta no fue sacada de una película, pasó durante la carrera de España de 1970 así que sí, concretamente pega durísimo." to English but in an extremely verbose and formal manner with thees and thous.

I solemnly swear that this depiction was not extracted from the confines of a cinematic production. It transpired during the Spanish race of the year 1970; thus, indeed, it doth strike with considerable force.
Translate "Esto no es asunto tuyo. Sigue bajando." to English
This is none of your business. Keep scrolling.

Translate "執事は大事なお仕事中なので、甘利兄さんをよろしくね、ふくちゃん。
おまかせあれ、しつじ！" to English

"The butler is in the middle of important work, so please take care of Amari brother, Fukuchan.
Leave it to me, butler!"

Translate "執事は大事なお仕事中なので、甘利兄さんをよろしくね、ふくちゃん。
おまかせあれ、しつじ！" to any random widely-spoken non Indo-European language.

Since you've requested a translation into a random widely-spoken non Indo-European language, I'll translate the text into Mandarin Chinese (Simplified), which is one of the most widely spoken languages in the world:

"由于管家正在忙于重要的工作，请福ちゃん好好照顾甘利兄。
请放心，管家！"

Please note, "福ちゃん" (Fukuchan) and "甘利兄" (Amari brother) are retained in their original form as names and informal titles, which may not have a direct translation in Mandarin.
